essence: Specialist in tree care, pruning, and health assessment to maintain safe and healthy urban and rural trees.

identity.title: Arborist
identity.summary: Assesses tree health, performs pruning and removals, and advises on tree management for safety and biodiversity.

salary.notes: Consultant arborists and those with advanced qualifications command higher fees.

qualifications: Knowledge of tree biology and pest/disease identification
Experience with chainsaws and aerial work platforms
Strong risk assessment and client communication skills

lifestyle.description: Outdoor specialist work with physical demands and client interaction; often self‑employed or contractor roles.

habits: Advises clients on tree care and safety
